# Rico's Auto Repair

> Trusted auto repair in Delray Beach, FL. Quality service, fair prices, and honest mechanics for every job.

## Contact
- Phone: (561) 272-1886
- Email: ricosautorepair@gmail.com
- Address: 1 Linton Blvd #23, Delray Beach, FL 33444
- Website: https://ricos-auto-repair-production.up.railway.app/

## Hours
Mo-Fr 08:00-17:00, Sa 08:00-14:00

## Services
  - General Repair
  - Brake Service
  - Engine Work
  - Electrical
  - Oil Changes
  - Inspections

## Service Area
- Primary: Delray Beach, FL
- Also serving: greater Delray Beach metropolitan area
